title: Freight surcharge exception after temporary window closes

intent_contract.task_statement: Choose the freight quote action after the temporary surcharge exception window closes.
success_criteria: Use the currently effective freight-pricing rule.
hard_constraints: Use the currently effective freight-pricing rule, not an expired surcharge exception window.
soft_preferences: Apply the least restrictive rule that is still valid.
forbidden_actions: Quote freight using an expired surcharge exception window.
allowed_scope_expansions: You may mention that the temporary surcharge exception has ended.
stop_conditions: Stop after selecting the freight quote action.

corpus.title: Temporary freight surcharge exception
corpus.text: Notice: freight surcharge exception open through July 9 for route FR-18.

corpus.title: Freight surcharge closure notice
corpus.text: Closure notice: surcharge exception closed on July 9 and standard freight pricing resumed.

events.text: A temporary freight notice says the surcharge exception was open through July 9.

payload.summary: Temporary freight surcharge exception allowed reduced charges through July 9.

events.text: A later closure notice says standard freight pricing resumed after July 9.

payload.summary: Latest notice says the surcharge exception is closed and standard freight pricing is active.

events.text: Choose the freight quote action for route FR-18 requested on July 13.
